title: Stanbic IBTC Bank’s Reward4Saving Promo Produces New Millionaires - FinancialEDGE
description: Stanbic IBTC Bank recently awarded cash prizes to 77 customers during the third quarterly and ninth monthly draws of its Reward4Saving 3.0 Promo. These draws were recently held at the Bank's head office in Victoria Island, Lagos. Seven customers won a cash prize of ₦1,000,000 each, while the remaining 70 customers won ₦100,000 each. 10
html:
Stanbic IBTC Bank recently awarded cash prizes to 77 customers during the third quarterly and ninth monthly draws of its Reward4Saving 3.0 Promo. These draws were recently held at the Bank’s head office in Victoria Island, Lagos.

Seven customers won a cash prize of ₦1,000,000 each, while the remaining 70 customers won ₦100,000 each. 10 winners were selected from each of the Bank’s seven business zones for the monthly draw, and one winner was selected per business zone for the ₦1,000,000 prize. The winners expressed their excitement at the venue of the cheque presentation ceremony and they also shared positive feedback on their experience banking with Stanbic IBTC Bank.

The Reward4Saving Promo, which began in 2021, has rewarded over 1,700 customers with a total of ₦276 million in less than three years. The promo encourages savings among Nigerians by recognizing and rewarding lucky individuals who consistently save.

Sadiya Ojo, the Head of Entrenchment at Stanbic IBTC Bank, expressed gratitude to the customers for choosing the Bank as their preferred financial partner. She mentioned that the Reward4Saving Promo aligns with the Bank’s commitment to promoting a savings culture and helping customers to achieve their financial goals. The promo will reward seven people with ₦2 million each and an additional seven people with ₦1 million each during its grand finale. 70 customers will be rewarded with ₦100,000 every month until August 2024.

Since the launch of the third season in September 2023, the Bank has conducted nine draws, and 651 customers have won cash prizes ranging from ₦100,000 to ₦1 million. The Bank has given out a total of ₦84 million prizes since the beginning of season three.

New and existing customers can participate in the promo by saving at least ₦10,000 in their Stanbic IBTC Bank Savings Account or @ease wallets for at least 30 days. Interested individuals can open their Stanbic IBTC Bank Savings Account through the Bank’s Mobile App, available on Google Play Store and iOS Store. Alternatively, they can dial *909*37#, visit the Bank’s website, www.stanbicibtcbank.com, or visit any Stanbic IBTC Bank branch nationwide.

By cultivating consistent saving habits, customers secure their financial future and open doors to more rewards; ultimately bolstering their economic security and paving their way towards financial freedom.
